resources.string: Reverse USB tethering with a clearer control panel.
A focused screen for starting the tunnel, tracking connection state, and handling Android VPN permission without guesswork.
The live status message updates here as the VPN permission flow starts, connects, or stops.
1. Connect the device over USB before starting the tunnel.
2. Tap Start VPN and approve the Android system VPN dialog if it appears.
3. Use Stop VPN anytime to end the session cleanly.
